app.title: OOC ストーリー（日本語 UI ベータ）
app.languagePreferenceLoadFailed: Could not load language preference from the server. Using local settings.
app.languagePreferenceSaveFailed: Language preference was not saved to the server.

conversation.title: Story History
conversation.confirmDeleteConversation: Are you sure you want to delete this story? This action cannot be undone.

storyActions.generateCurrentTooltip: Generate or regenerate the current chapter content (does not advance to next chapter)
storyActions.nextChapterTooltip: Confirm current chapter is satisfactory, then generate next chapter content (advances to next chapter)
storyActions.rewritePrompt: Please enter rewrite requirements or feedback:
storyActions.rewritePlaceholder: e.g., Make the plot more tense and exciting...
storyActions.modifyPrompt: Please enter modification requirements or feedback:
storyActions.deleteLastMessageTooltip: Delete the last message and related character records
storyActions.confirmDeleteLastMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the last message? This will also delete related character records.
storyActions.confirmNextChapterBody: Confirm and move to the next chapter? This is hard to undo; use "Continue current chapter" if you only want more text in this chapter.
storyActions.confirmDestructiveRewrite: Apply a full rewrite using this feedback? A new assistant reply will be appended.
storyActions.confirmDestructiveModify: Apply edits using this feedback? A new assistant reply will be appended.

onboarding.title: Get started
onboarding.stepPickStory: Create or select a story from the list on the left.
onboarding.stepOutline: Open story settings and add a background plus outline.
onboarding.stepModel: Pick an AI provider and model in the bar above or in Settings.

serverBanner.failed: Could not reach the local API.

storyWarnings.characterParseNotice: Character tags in this reply were only partially parsed; the story text was kept. Check characters in settings if the roster looks off.

storyErrors.persistStreamBodySavedNotHistory: The reply was shown but may not be saved to history. You can retry sending or check the server log.
storyErrors.hint_network: Check that the local API is running and the port is correct.
storyErrors.hint_auth: Open Settings and verify the API token matches the desktop app.
storyErrors.hint_timeout: The request timed out. Try again or use a smaller model context.
storyErrors.hint_ollama: Start Ollama or switch provider in AI Settings.
storyErrors.hint_api_key: Configure your API key in Settings > AI Settings.

serverStatus.ollamaRunning: Ollama service is running (run command: ollama serve)
serverStatus.defaultPort: Service is running on default port 11434

settingsPanel.title: Settings
settingsPanel.apiUrlOpenAICompatiblePlaceholder: e.g. http://127.0.0.1:1234 (v1 is appended if missing)
settingsPanel.enableFreeformNote: Show narration / user note bar in chat (appends a user message)
settingsPanel.dataIntro: Export a local diagnostic ZIP (no API keys), copy your SQLite database, or restore from a backup. Restore stops the local API briefly; avoid running during generation.
settingsPanel.dataUpdaterNoUpdate: You are already on the latest version.
settingsPanel.dataUpdaterInstalled: Update downloaded. Restart the app to finish installation.
settingsPanel.dataDesktopOnly: These actions are available in the desktop app (Tauri) only.
settingsPanel.dataRestoreConfirm: Replace the current database with the selected file? The app will restart the local API.
settingsPanel.dataRestoreDone: Database restored. You may need to reload the story list.
settingsPanel.dataEncryptedErrInvalidPassword: Invalid password. Cannot decrypt backup package.
settingsPanel.dataEncryptedErrCorruptedPackage: Backup package is corrupted or invalid.
settingsPanel.dataEncryptedErrVersionUnsupported: Backup package version is not supported.
settingsPanel.dataEncryptedErrIo: Failed to read or write backup package. Check disk and permissions.
settingsPanel.dataEncryptedErrCrypto: Encryption or decryption failed. Please retry.

conversationSettingsForm.title: Story Settings
conversationSettingsForm.backgroundPlaceholder: Describe the background and world of the story...
conversationSettingsForm.backgroundRequired: Please fill in the story background first
conversationSettingsForm.supplementPlaceholder: Additional notes, special rules, important points, etc...
conversationSettingsForm.atLeastOneCharacter: Please add at least one character
conversationSettingsForm.outlinePlaceholderAuto: Story outline, main plot, etc... (Leave empty to auto-generate)
conversationSettingsForm.characterGenerationHintsPlaceholder: Character generation requirements (optional, e.g., a brave knight, a mysterious wizard, etc.)
conversationSettingsForm.allowAutoGenerateCharactersTooltip: Allow AI to automatically add new characters when generating stories
conversationSettingsForm.allowAutoGenerateMainCharacters: Allow AI to auto-generate main characters
conversationSettingsForm.allowAutoGenerateMainCharactersTooltip: Allow AI to automatically add main characters when generating stories (requires 'Allow AI to auto-generate characters' to be enabled)
conversationSettingsForm.totalSectionsHint: With a fixed total, progress shows chapter i of N; ongoing hides N. Saved to story progress when you save settings.

summaryPrompt.title: Story Summary
summaryPrompt.messageNote: It is recommended to generate a summary to reduce token consumption.
summaryPrompt.note: After summarization, the complete story content will still be saved in the database, but subsequent conversations will use the summary content as context to reduce token calculation.
summaryPrompt.summaryPlaceholder: Please fill in the story summary, or click the button above to let AI generate it...
summaryPrompt.summaryRequired: Please fill in the summary content

chat.exportStory: Export current story content as text file
chat.userNotePlaceholder: User note or narration (saved as user message)
